title: Dashboard Report Linking Modal UX Enhancement
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want clear direction on the dashboard relationship follow-up process, so that I understand what action to take when linking reports from a related dashboard.
description:
Redesigns the 'Dashboard Relationship' modal to improve clarity and usability:

1. Modal title changed to 'Add related reports from related dashboard'
2. Instructional text added below the title explaining the process
3. 'Add' button relocated below the text, relabeled to 'Relate Selected Reports', only shown when 1+ reports are selected via checkbox, fixed at 160px wide
4. 'Close window' button added, also 160px wide
5. Buttons centered
6. Secondary header removed
acceptance_criteria: Modal title reads 'Add related reports from related dashboard'
Instructional text appears below the title
Relate Selected Reports button appears only when 1+ reports selected
Close window button present at 160px width
ux_changes: Redesigned dashboard relationship modal: new title, instructional text, conditional 'Relate Selected Reports' button (160px), 'Close window' button (160px), centered layout, removed secondary header.
comment_summary: Developer picked up the ticket and completed the UX changes. Pushed to staging for review.
